report.summary: Drafted 4 new tweets (#159-162: Institutional Rotation thread, Tax Countdown, Convergence Day Preview, Solver Networks), newsletter v26 convergence preview section, Discord/TG alert v12, and created Convergence Thursday SVG social card.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #159: Institutional Rotation 5-part thread — ETF inflows down 73%, $12.8B tokenized treasury flows, retail capitulation vs institutional repositioning (Thu Mar 27 8AM ET)
Tweet #160: Tax Season Countdown — 21 days to April 15, links to tax calculator and crypto regulations guide (Thu Mar 27 2PM ET)
Tweet #161: Convergence Day Preview — $13.5B options expiry, SEC 91 ETF rulings, BTC $5K below max pain (Thu Mar 27 6AM ET)
Tweet #162: Solver Networks & Order Flow Auctions guide spotlight — CoW Protocol $87B vol (Fri Mar 28 11AM ET)
Newsletter v26 addition: Convergence Thursday preview + Institutional Divergence deep-dive + new guides recap
Discord/Telegram Late Night Alert v12 — convergence countdown with tool links and 6 new guide highlights
Content calendar v39 loaded through Fri Mar 28 (8 posts across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email)
